retry_reason: If the queue was not split (first branch), no refcount operation is performed; if it was split (else branch), references are released and the queue is gone, so retry is invalid.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to handle splitting a merged bfq queue, which involves conditionally updating queue state (pid, flags) or releasing references. Reference-count operations (put_cooperator, release_process_ref) are part of the split logic, not the sole purpose.
judge.retry_reason: If the queue was not split (first branch), no refcount operation is performed; if it was split (else branch), references are released and the queue is gone, so retry is invalid.

final.retry_reason: If the queue was not split (first branch), no refcount operation is performed; if it was split (else branch), references are released and the queue is gone, so retry is invalid.
